use_codes.desc: THE TREATMENT OF UNCOMPLICATED URINARY TRACT INFECTIONS

indications.text:
Proquin XR is indicated only for the treatment of uncomplicated urinary tract infections
(acute cystitis) caused by susceptible strains of the designated microorganisms listed
below. Proquin XR is not interchangeable with other ciprofloxacin extended-release or
immediate release oral formulations. S...

To reduce the development of drug-resistant bacteria and maintain the effectiveness of Proquin
XR and other antibacterial drugs, Proquin XR should be used only to treat uncomplicated urinary
tract infections that are strongly suspected to be caused by bacteria. When culture and
